onset.Description: Time from start of recording until event onset

sample.Description: Index of the first sample corresponding to the event onset in the continuous recording

type.Description: Type of event or source stream in the raw data

Levels.Markers: Events extracted from LSL/XDF marker stream

value.Description: Event category (value) and associated parameters. May include stimulus identifier, scale type, and participant responses.

Levels.event: anchorsPresented;: Display of rating scale anchors to participant as prime pre-Stimulus presentation; scale type provided
Levels.event: presentedStimulus: Presentation of main stimulus; stimulus ID provided
Levels.event: scalePresented; scale: SAM-arousa: Presentation of SAM plus arousal rating scale; 9-point scale
Levels.event: scalePresented; scale: SAM-valenc: Presentation of SAM plus valence rating scale; 9-point scale
Levels.event: scalePresented; scale: SAM-domina: Presentation of SAM plus dominance rating scale; 9-point scale
Levels.event: scalePresented; scale: Likert-Sch: Presentation of 5-point scale Likert scale for rating beauty
Levels.event: scalePresented; scale: Likert-Hei: Presentation of 5-point scale Likert scale for rating hominess
Levels.event: scalePresented; scale: Likert-Str: Presentation of 5-point scale Likert scale for rating stress
Levels.event: scalePresented; scale: Likert-Fas: Presentation of 5-point scale Likert scale for rating fascination
Levels.event: scalePresented; scale: Likert-Off: Presentation of 5-point scale Likert scale for rating openness
Levels.event: scalePresented; scale: Likert-Sic: Presentation of 5-point scale Likert scale for rating safety
Levels.event: optionConfirmed: Participant confirmed response; includes scale type, stimulus ID, and response value
